author: Yannick Croissant
subject: feat(refinement-list): implement `getRenderState` and `getWidgetRenderState` (#4549)
body:
* feat(refinement-list): implement `getRenderState` and `getWidgetRenderState`

* Remove render function

* Split tests

* Fix getRenderState to work without init

* Pass renderOptions to searchForFacetValues

* Update test to check for renderingOptions between renders
